name: Chris Redfield and Leon Kennedy
description:
Chris and Leon adopt a hybrid - Puppy Version.
-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-
I heavily headcanon Leon and Chris having some form of romantic feelings for eachother, and I love bots with the both of 'em, so here's two traumatised boyfriends adopting you, their puppy hybrid! I don't know how well this will work, sorry! First bot with multiple characters. Bunny version on profile.
